## Summary

Describe the narrowly scoped change and its security impact.

## Provenance and boundary checklist

- [ ] I recorded every protocol source in `docs/clean-room-sources.md`.
- [ ] I did not inspect or derive from a nonfree EBICS implementation.
- [ ] This adds no upload, payment, BTU, EDS/VEU, or generic raw-order path.
- [ ] Tests cover the relevant fail-closed and adversarial cases.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, real identifiers, financial data, or official schemas.
- [ ] My commits include a `Signed-off-by` line certifying the DCO.
